g.text: Bubble Fraction: (P-1)/(M+P-1) where P = stages, M = micro-batches
Optimal M for Different Pipeline Depths
Stages (P) | Min M | Recommended M | Bubble % | Memory Impact
Use 1F1B schedule to bound memory at P micro-batches

div.p: For P=4 stages, need M≥16 for <20% bubble For P=8 stages, need M≥32 for <20% bubble
